message:
feat(membrane): add unified Alien CS metrics module with contention scoring

- MetricRing: capacity-bounded event buffer for structured metric emission
- MetricEventKind: SeqLockCacheMiss, EbrEpochAdvance, FcCombiningPass, etc.
- AlienCsSnapshot: unified diagnostics aggregation across all 4 concepts
- compute_contention_score: weighted score from cache miss ratio, pinned
  thread fraction, and batching efficiency
- 11 unit tests covering ring lifecycle, overflow, drain, filtering, and
  contention scoring under various workload profiles
- Closes bd-1sp.11

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
